title: wolfhsm_rsa_sign used for all RsaRawOp variants misleads contributors
description: RsaKey::raw_op calls wolfhsm_rsa_sign for every RsaRawOp variant including PublicEncrypt and PublicDecrypt. A contributor tracing raw_op(RsaRawOp::PublicEncrypt) sees wolfhsm_rsa_sign and concludes the wrong function is being called. If wolfhsm_rsa_sign is the generic raw RSA dispatch, that must be stated in a comment; otherwise this will generate confused bug reports and incorrect patches.
